top_signals.title: Global tech stocks fall as AI trade goes into reverse
top_signals.summary: Index of US semiconductor stocks on track for its worst week since last year’s ‘liberation day’ rout
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bowman, Responsible Innovation and Financial Inclusion
top_signals.summary: Speech At “Next-Gen Financial Inclusion,” the third annual Financial Inclusion Conference hosted by the Federal Reserve Board, Washington, D.C. (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Amundi to Book €300 Million Gain From IPO of Indian Venture
top_signals.summary: Amundi SA says it expects to book net capital gain of around €300 million ($343 million) from the initial public offering of its asset management joint venture in India.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Paschi Casts Doubts On Intesa Bid, Urges Studying BPM Plan
top_signals.summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA expressed a number of concerns over a takeover bid by Intesa Sanpaolo SpA while highlighting perceived benefits in a broad, rival pitch presented by Banco BPM SpA.
